evals.prompt: I want to build a fermentation detail screen in React. It should show the current status, the latest sample values, and any active protocol alerts. What API calls do I need and what will the responses look like?
evals.expected_output: Maps the UI requirements to specific endpoints: GET /fermentations/{id}, GET /fermentations/{id}/samples/latest, GET /executions/{execution_id}/alerts. Explains response shapes, auth requirements (Bearer token), multi-tenancy (automatic via JWT), and suggests polling strategy for live data. Does not invent endpoints that don't exist.
expectations: References only real endpoints from the skill's catalog
Notes that winery_id is automatic via JWT (not passed manually)
Specifies a concrete polling interval (30-60 seconds) for keeping live fermentation data current
Covers the alert acknowledge vs dismiss distinction (two separate endpoints with different semantics)

evals.prompt: How do I implement login and token refresh in a React frontend for this system?
evals.expected_output: Full auth flow: POST /api/v1/auth/login → store access_token in memory + refresh_token in httpOnly cookie, axios interceptor for 401 → POST /api/v1/auth/refresh → retry, GET /api/v1/auth/me to load user role, redirect to /login on refresh failure. Explains WINEMAKER vs ADMIN role difference and which endpoints each can access.
expectations: Recommends access_token in memory (not localStorage) for security
References GET /api/v1/auth/me for loading user context

evals.prompt: What screens does the frontend need and what API endpoints back each one?
evals.expected_output: Maps the suggested screen list from the skill to their backing endpoints: dashboard (list fermentations + statistics), detail screen (fermentation + samples + alerts + advisories), protocol tracker (execution + completions + alerts), admin screens (wineries). Flags that historical data uses X-Winery-ID header, not Bearer token.
expectations: Covers all major screen areas (dashboard, detail, protocol, admin)
Maps each screen to specific endpoint(s)
Flags the X-Winery-ID header on historical endpoints
Mentions analysis engine endpoints for the anomaly/recommendation flow
